title: Flameborne
description: A Fire Themed 1.8.9 PvP Texturepack Derived from the Heatwave PvP Texturepack
body:
# Credits
**Super big thanks to [Torrezx](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/torrezx/) since the netherite tools in this texturepack are massively inspired by the ones in his [Demon Fire Tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/torrezx-demond-fire) texturepack so huge credits to him, go check out his work because he's genuinely amazing**

------------------------------
After seeing that a lot of people liked the theme of [Heatwave](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/heatwave-16x) I dediced to bring it back for a 1.8.9 PvP texturepack.

Flameborne is a 1.8.9 PvP texturepack that unites good looking textures to an amazing fire theme, designed for any kind of gamemode, for example bedwars or skywars, but it can really be used wherever you like.

The fire theme is applied to the diamond set, the GUI and HUD, particles and most of the in-game PvP related items such as fireballs, shears, tnt, etc. However other armor and tools sets are still retexture and to really give a complete experience there are also some good quality of life features such as a smaller crosshair, cleaner wool, a loading bar as the block breaking animation and no explosion particles.
